title: Animate the Unanimatable
description: Use @property for smooth custom property animation.
whyItWorks: Aesthetic-Usability Effect — smooth, polished transitions read as higher quality and more usable.

title: The Parent Selector That Does Everything
description: Style ancestors from child state with pure CSS.
whyItWorks: Law of Proximity & Common Region — one control (checkbox) visually groups and updates the whole card, so the relationship is obvious.

title: Scroll-Driven Animations
description: Drive keyframes directly from scroll progression.

title: Validation That Waits For You
description: Apply invalid styles only after user interaction.

title: Make Interactions Interruptible
description: Transitions interpolate toward the latest state and can be interrupted; keyframe animations run on a fixed timeline.
